pageHero.heading: Contact us
pageHero.intro: Have a question about care, insurance, or scheduling? Reach out by email. We respond as soon as we can.

contactInfo.heading: We are here to help
contactInfo.intro: Elevate serves patients in California and Nevada. Virtual appointments are available through a secure telehealth platform.

ctaPanel.heading: Ready to schedule?
ctaPanel.description: Request an appointment to start care with Elevate. Virtual visits are available for your convenience.

footer.description: Providing individualized psychiatric care and brief psychotherapy designed to help you feel better and live better.
